failedAssertions.reason: POST /api/shares with read-only API key returns 500 instead of 403. The shares route uses getRequestContext() instead of getResolvedContext(), so API key auth is never resolved (userId stays __api_key_pending__). Also missing enforceScope(ctx, 'shares:write') call.

API key rate limiters (apiKeyGeneralRateLimiter 300/min, apiKeyReadRateLimiter 60/min, apiKeyWriteRateLimiter 10/min) are defined in rate-limit.ts but .check() is never called in any route handler or middleware. All burst requests succeed with 200 and no rate limit headers.

After revoking an API key, the UI does not display the 'Revoked' badge. GET /api/keys returns computed 'status' field but not 'revoked_at'. Frontend ApiKeysSection checks !!apiKey.revoked_at which is always undefined. Fix: either check apiKey.status === 'revoked' in frontend OR include revoked_at in GET /api/keys response.

appliedUpdates.description: Added API Key Testing Accounts section with 4 test accounts, session cookie and API key creation instructions, and API key format documentation.
